See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 67021 => 'Manufahi', 67022 => 'Cova Lima', 67023 => 'Bobonaro', 67024 => 'Ainaro', 67025 => 'Dekuse', 67031 => 'Dili', 67032 => 'Dili', 67033 => 'Dili', 67036 => 'Liquica', 67037 => 'Aileu', 67038 => 'Ermera', 67039 => 'Oekusi', 67041 => 'Baucau', 67042 => 'Manatuto', 67043 => 'Viqueque', 67044 => 'Lautem', ];
